## Summary

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Engine (`packages/engine`) — pure logic / reducers / AI / balancing
- [ ] Web (`apps/web`) — UI, state, persistence, i18n
- [ ] Content (`apps/web/content`) — scenarios, messages, assets
- [ ] Tooling — CI, scripts, dev experience
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @aurion/engine test` passes (if engine touched)
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @aurion/web build` succeeds (if web touched)
- [ ] No new dependencies, or new deps justified in the description
- [ ] Engine still has zero React/DOM imports (if engine touched)
